home.description: Frontend-focused Developer with 4+ years of experience, originally focused on backend using Laravel. Currently specializing in React.js to build responsive interfaces and effective API integration.

about.title: About Me
about.careerDesc: I'm a Frontend Developer with over 4 years of experience in the tech industry. My journey started as a full-stack developer focused on backend development with Laravel, but I've since specialized in frontend development using React.js and Next.js.
about.skillsDesc: I have deep expertise in building responsive and modern web interfaces. With a strong backend background, I understand API architecture and collaborate effectively with backend developers. I'm experienced with modern technologies like React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
about.experienceDesc: Developed various web applications for government and education clients. Handling projects from school management systems, public information platforms, to REST APIs for administrative applications.
about.methodologyDesc: I believe in clear communication with clients and teams. I work with agile methodology, providing regular updates and being open to feedback. I also believe in clean code and good documentation to ease future maintenance.
about.hobbiesDesc: Outside work, I enjoy learning about new technologies and the latest trends in web development. I actively participate in developer communities and often share knowledge with fellow developers. I also enjoy following tutorials and reading documentation to continuously improve my skills.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A collection of projects I've worked on, from government service systems, school management, to REST APIs for internal applications.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.heading: Contact me for project discussions or collaboration opportunities
contact.description: I'm always open to hearing about new projects and job opportunities. Feel free to reach out through the channels below.
